dtsPropsFor.StatusBadge:
/** Trade-copier status string; drives the badge color. Known values: "Active" (green), "Starting" / "Connected" / "Syncing" (yellow), "Paused" (gray), "Disconnected" (orange), "Error" (red). Any other value falls back to gray. */
  status: string;
dtsPropsFor.LinksTable:
/** Called when a link row is selected (e.g. to open its symbol/magic mappings). Links and terminals are fetched and managed internally. */
  onSelectLink: (linkId: number) => void;
dtsPropsFor.TerminalsTable: /** No props — fetches, displays and manages the terminal list internally. */
